title: Merge node not receiving expected inputs
symptom: The merge node reports that it hasn't received all expected inputs, causing the workflow to fail. The node 'extract revisions' does not output as expected during full workflow execution.
applies_when: Using a merge node to combine parallel paths
Workflow contains multiple nodes that may execute in parallel
not_this_if: All nodes are executed sequentially without parallel paths
The merge node is configured correctly to handle inputs
root_cause: The merge node executed before the 'extract revisions' node completed, leading to an incomplete input set. This can happen when the workflow execution is not properly synchronized, especially with parallel paths.
fix_steps: Replace the custom merge node 'merge everything back1' with the standard merge node
Ensure that the workflow is designed to wait for all parallel nodes to complete before merging
agent_instruction: Use the standard merge node to ensure all parallel executions complete before merging.
